response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong general software engineering skills and performance optimization expertise, this Principal-level role requires deep specialization in AI accelerator hardware optimization, SoC/IP modeling, and GPU architecture—domains entirely absent from his background. His experience is exclusively in software development (web, mobile, backend, tooling) rather than hardware acceleration or silicon design. The mismatch is too fundamental despite his technical seniority.
strengths: Extensive performance optimization experience (low-latency systems at Dunnhumby, async I/O, caching, databases)
Systems-level programming background (C++, DLang, embedded systems, infrastructure tooling)
Principal/Staff-level technical leadership with proven mentoring and architectural thinking
concerns: No AI accelerator, GPU architecture, or deep learning workload optimization experience
Missing SoC and IP modeling expertise central to the role's core responsibilities
Education and experience entirely software-focused; no hardware-software co-design or silicon design background
